titles.en: Chapter on the husband's Rights Over His Wife
Man La Yahduruhu al-Faqih
Chapter on the husband's Rights Over His Wife

segments: : "جَاءَتِ اِمْرَأَةٌ إِلَى رَسُولِ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ فَقَالَتْ يَا رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ مَا حَقُّ اَلزَّوْجِ عَلَى اَلْمَرْأَةِ فَقَالَ لَهَا "تُطِيعُهُ وَ لاَ تَعْصِيهِ وَ لاَ تَصَدَّقُ مِنْ بَيْتِهَا شَيْئاً إِلاَّ بِإِذْنِهِ وَ لاَ تَصُومُ تَطَوُّعاً إِلاَّ بِإِذْنِهِ وَ لاَ تَمْنَعُهُ نَفْسَهَا وَ إِنْ كَانَتْ عَلَى ظَهْرِ قَتَبٍ وَ لاَ تَخْرُجُ مِنْ بَيْتِهَا إِلاَّ بِإِذْنِهِ فَإِنْ خَرَجَتْ بِغَيْرِ إِذْنِهِ لَعَنَتْهَا مَلاَئِكَةُ اَلسَّمَاءِ وَ مَلاَئِكَةُ اَلْأَرْضِ وَ مَلاَئِكَةُ اَلْغَضَبِ وَ مَلاَئِكَةُ اَلرَّحْمَةِ حَتَّى تَرْجِعَ إِلَى بَيْتِهَا" فَقَالَتْ يَا رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ مَنْ أَعْظَمُ اَلنَّاسِ حَقّاً عَلَى اَلرَّجُلِ قَالَ "وَالِدَاهُ" قَالَتْ فَمَنْ أَعْظَمُ اَلنَّاسِ حَقّاً عَلَى اَلْمَرْأَةِ قَالَ "زَوْجُهَا" قَالَتْ فَمَا لِي مِنَ اَلْحَقِّ عَلَيْهِ مِثْلُ مَا لَهُ عَلَيَّ قَالَ "لاَ وَ لاَ مِنْ كُلِّ مِائَةٍ وَاحِدَةٌ" فَقَالَتْ وَ اَلَّذِي بَعَثَكَ بِالْحَقِّ نَبِيّاً لاَ يَمْلِكُ رَقَبَتِي رَجُلٌ أَبَداً ".
arabic.text: : "جَاءَتِ اِمْرَأَةٌ إِلَى رَسُولِ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ فَقَالَتْ يَا رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ مَا حَقُّ اَلزَّوْجِ عَلَى اَلْمَرْأَةِ فَقَالَ لَهَا "تُطِيعُهُ وَ لاَ تَعْصِيهِ وَ لاَ تَصَدَّقُ مِنْ بَيْتِهَا شَيْئاً إِلاَّ بِإِذْنِهِ وَ لاَ تَصُومُ تَطَوُّعاً إِلاَّ بِإِذْنِهِ وَ لاَ تَمْنَعُهُ نَفْسَهَا وَ إِنْ كَانَتْ عَلَى ظَهْرِ قَتَبٍ وَ لاَ تَخْرُجُ مِنْ بَيْتِهَا إِلاَّ بِإِذْنِهِ فَإِنْ خَرَجَتْ بِغَيْرِ إِذْنِهِ لَعَنَتْهَا مَلاَئِكَةُ اَلسَّمَاءِ وَ مَلاَئِكَةُ اَلْأَرْضِ وَ مَلاَئِكَةُ اَلْغَضَبِ وَ مَلاَئِكَةُ اَلرَّحْمَةِ حَتَّى تَرْجِعَ إِلَى بَيْتِهَا" فَقَالَتْ يَا رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ مَنْ أَعْظَمُ اَلنَّاسِ حَقّاً عَلَى اَلرَّجُلِ قَالَ "وَالِدَاهُ" قَالَتْ فَمَنْ أَعْظَمُ اَلنَّاسِ حَقّاً عَلَى اَلْمَرْأَةِ قَالَ "زَوْجُهَا" قَالَتْ فَمَا لِي مِنَ اَلْحَقِّ عَلَيْهِ مِثْلُ مَا لَهُ عَلَيَّ قَالَ "لاَ وَ لاَ مِنْ كُلِّ مِائَةٍ وَاحِدَةٌ" فَقَالَتْ وَ اَلَّذِي بَعَثَكَ بِالْحَقِّ نَبِيّاً لاَ يَمْلِكُ رَقَبَتِي رَجُلٌ أَبَداً ".

segments:
Hadith.4513 - Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub narrated from Malik ibn Atiyyah, from Muhammad ibn Muslim, from Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as), who said:
A woman came to the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace and blessings be upon him and his family) and said: "O Messenger of Allah (swt), what is the right of a husband over his wife?"
Imam (as) said: "She must obey him and not disobey him. She must not give anything in charity from his house except with his permission, and she must not observe voluntary fasting except with his permission. She must not deny him herself, even if she is on the back of a camel. She must not leave her house without his permission. If she leaves without his permission, the angels of the heavens, the angels of the earth, the angels of wrath, and the angels of mercy will curse her until she returns to her house."
She then asked: "O Messenger of Allah (swt), who has the greatest right over a man?"
He (sw) said: "His parents."
She asked: "And who has the greatest right over a woman?"
He (sw) said: "Her husband."
She then asked: "Do I have the same right over him as he has over me?"
He (sw) replied: "No, not even one out of a hundred."
She said: "By the One who sent you as a Prophet with truth, no man will ever have control over my neck!"
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.4513 - Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub narrated from Malik ibn Atiyyah, from Muhammad ibn Muslim, from Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as), who said:
A woman came to the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace and blessings be upon him and his family) and said: "O Messenger of Allah (swt), what is the right of a husband over his wife?"
Imam (as) said: "She must obey him and not disobey him. She must not give anything in charity from his house except with his permission, and she must not observe voluntary fasting except with his permission. She must not deny him herself, even if she is on the back of a camel. She must not leave her house without his permission. If she leaves without his permission, the angels of the heavens, the angels of the earth, the angels of wrath, and the angels of mercy will curse her until she returns to her house."
She then asked: "O Messenger of Allah (swt), who has the greatest right over a man?"
He (sw) said: "His parents."
She asked: "And who has the greatest right over a woman?"
He (sw) said: "Her husband."
She then asked: "Do I have the same right over him as he has over me?"
He (sw) replied: "No, not even one out of a hundred."
She said: "By the One who sent you as a Prophet with truth, no man will ever have control over my neck!"

narratorChain.raw: 4513 - رَوَى اَلْحَسَنُ بْنُ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ مَالِكِ بْنِ عَطِيَّةَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

titles.en: Man La Yahduruhu al-Faqih
Chapter on the husband's Rights Over His Wife

segments: : لَيْسَ لِلْمَرْأَةِ مَعَ زَوْجِهَا أَمْرٌ فِي عِتْقٍ وَ لَا صَدَقَةٍ وَ لَا تَدْبِيرٍ وَ لَا هِبَةٍ وَ لَا نَذْرٍ فِي مَالِهَا إِلَّا بِإِذْنِ زَوْجِهَا إِلَّا فِي حَجٍّ أَوْ زَكَاةٍ أَوْ بِرِّ وَالِدَيْهَا أَوْ صِلَةِ قَرَابَتِهَا.
arabic.text: : لَيْسَ لِلْمَرْأَةِ مَعَ زَوْجِهَا أَمْرٌ فِي عِتْقٍ وَ لَا صَدَقَةٍ وَ لَا تَدْبِيرٍ وَ لَا هِبَةٍ وَ لَا نَذْرٍ فِي مَالِهَا إِلَّا بِإِذْنِ زَوْجِهَا إِلَّا فِي حَجٍّ أَوْ زَكَاةٍ أَوْ بِرِّ وَالِدَيْهَا أَوْ صِلَةِ قَرَابَتِهَا.

segments:
Hadith.4514 - Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub narrated from Abdullah ibn Sinan, from Abu Abdillah (as), who said:
"A woman has no authority, alongside her husband, to emancipate (a slave), give charity, make a bequest, give a gift, or make a vow concerning her wealth without her husband's permission, except in matters of Hajj, Zakat, honoring her parents, or maintaining ties with her relatives."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.4514 - Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub narrated from Abdullah ibn Sinan, from Abu Abdillah (as), who said:
"A woman has no authority, alongside her husband, to emancipate (a slave), give charity, make a bequest, give a gift, or make a vow concerning her wealth without her husband's permission, except in matters of Hajj, Zakat, honoring her parents, or maintaining ties with her relatives."

narratorChain.raw: 4514 - وَ- رَوَى الْحَسَنُ بْنُ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

titles.en: Man La Yahduruhu al-Faqih
Chapter on the husband's Rights Over His Wife

segments: : "إِنَّ قَوْماً أَتَوْا رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ فَقَالُوا يَا رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ إِنَّا رَأَيْنَا أُنَاساً يَسْجُدُ بَعْضُهُمْ لِبَعْضِ فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ "لَوْ كُنْتُ آمِراً أَحَداً أَنْ يَسْجُدَ لِأَحَدٍ لَأَمَرْتُ اَلْمَرْأَةَ أَنْ تَسْجُدَ لِزَوْجِهَا".
arabic.text: : "إِنَّ قَوْماً أَتَوْا رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ فَقَالُوا يَا رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ إِنَّا رَأَيْنَا أُنَاساً يَسْجُدُ بَعْضُهُمْ لِبَعْضِ فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ "لَوْ كُنْتُ آمِراً أَحَداً أَنْ يَسْجُدَ لِأَحَدٍ لَأَمَرْتُ اَلْمَرْأَةَ أَنْ تَسْجُدَ لِزَوْجِهَا".

segments:
Hadith.4515 - Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub narrated from Malik ibn Atiyyah, from Sulaiman ibn Khalid, from Abu Abdillah (as), who said:
"A group of people came to the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace and blessings be upon him and his family) and said: 'O Messenger of Allah (swt), we have seen people prostrating to one another.'
The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace and blessings be upon him and his family) said: 'If I were to command anyone to prostrate to another, I would have commanded the woman to prostrate to her husband.'"
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.4515 - Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub narrated from Malik ibn Atiyyah, from Sulaiman ibn Khalid, from Abu Abdillah (as), who said:
"A group of people came to the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace and blessings be upon him and his family) and said: 'O Messenger of Allah (swt), we have seen people prostrating to one another.'
The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace and blessings be upon him and his family) said: 'If I were to command anyone to prostrate to another, I would have commanded the woman to prostrate to her husband.'"

narratorChain.raw: 4515 - وَ رَوَى اَلْحَسَنُ بْنُ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ مَالِكِ بْنِ عَطِيَّةَ عَنْ سُلَيْمَانَ بْنِ خَالِدٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

titles.en: Man La Yahduruhu al-Faqih
Chapter on the husband's Rights Over His Wife

segments: : "إِنَّ اَللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ كَتَبَ عَلَى اَلرِّجَالِ اَلْجِهَادَ وَ عَلَى اَلنِّسَاءِ اَلْجِهَادَ فَجِهَادُ اَلرَّجُلِ أَنْ يَبْذُلَ مَالَهُ وَ دَمَهُ حَتَّى يُقْتَلَ فِي سَبِيلِ اَللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَ جِهَادُ اَلْمَرْأَةِ أَنْ تَصْبِرَ عَلَى مَا تَرَى مِنْ أَذَى زَوْجِهَا وَ غَيْرَتِهِ".
arabic.text: : "إِنَّ اَللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ كَتَبَ عَلَى اَلرِّجَالِ اَلْجِهَادَ وَ عَلَى اَلنِّسَاءِ اَلْجِهَادَ فَجِهَادُ اَلرَّجُلِ أَنْ يَبْذُلَ مَالَهُ وَ دَمَهُ حَتَّى يُقْتَلَ فِي سَبِيلِ اَللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَ جِهَادُ اَلْمَرْأَةِ أَنْ تَصْبِرَ عَلَى مَا تَرَى مِنْ أَذَى زَوْجِهَا وَ غَيْرَتِهِ".

segments:
Hadith.4516 - Muhammad ibn al-Fudhayl narrated from Shurayh al-Wabishi, from Jabir, from Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as), who said:
"Indeed, Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic, has ordained jihad upon men and jihad upon women. The jihad of a man is to spend his wealth and sacrifice his blood until he is killed in the way of Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic. And the jihad of a woman is to be patient with what she faces from the harm and jealousy of her husband."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.4516 - Muhammad ibn al-Fudhayl narrated from Shurayh al-Wabishi, from Jabir, from Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as), who said:
"Indeed, Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic, has ordained jihad upon men and jihad upon women. The jihad of a man is to spend his wealth and sacrifice his blood until he is killed in the way of Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic. And the jihad of a woman is to be patient with what she faces from the harm and jealousy of her husband."

narratorChain.raw: 4516 - وَ رَوَى مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ اَلْفُضَيْلِ عَنْ شُرَيْسٍ اَلْوَابِشِيِّ عَنْ جَابِرٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

titles.en: Man La Yahduruhu al-Faqih
Chapter on the husband's Rights Over His Wife

segments: 4517 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: إِنَّ "اَلنَّاجِيَ مِنَ اَلرِّجَالِ قَلِيلٌ وَ مِنَ اَلنِّسَاءِ أَقَلُّ وَ أَقَلُّ".
arabic.text: 4517 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: إِنَّ "اَلنَّاجِيَ مِنَ اَلرِّجَالِ قَلِيلٌ وَ مِنَ اَلنِّسَاءِ أَقَلُّ وَ أَقَلُّ".

segments: Hadith.4517 - Imam (as) said: "Indeed, those who are saved from among the men are few, and from among the women, even fewer and fewer."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Hadith.4517 - Imam (as) said: "Indeed, those who are saved from among the men are few, and from among the women, even fewer and fewer."

titles.en: Man La Yahduruhu al-Faqih
Chapter on the husband's Rights Over His Wife

segments: 4518 - وَ فِي حَدِيثٍ آخَرَ قَالَ: "جِهَادُ اَلْمَرْأَةِ حُسْنُ اَلتَّبَعُّلِ ".
arabic.text: 4518 - وَ فِي حَدِيثٍ آخَرَ قَالَ: "جِهَادُ اَلْمَرْأَةِ حُسْنُ اَلتَّبَعُّلِ ".

segments:
Hadith.4518 - And in another narration, Imam (as) said:
"The jihad of a woman is being a good wife."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.4518 - And in another narration, Imam (as) said:
"The jihad of a woman is being a good wife."

titles.en: Man La Yahduruhu al-Faqih
Chapter on the husband's Rights Over His Wife

segments: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "أَيُّمَا اِمْرَأَةٍ بَاتَتْ وَ زَوْجُهَا عَلَيْهَا سَاخِطٌ فِي حَقٍّ لَمْ تُقْبَلْ مِنْهَا صَلاَةٌ حَتَّى يَرْضَى عَنْهَا".
arabic.text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "أَيُّمَا اِمْرَأَةٍ بَاتَتْ وَ زَوْجُهَا عَلَيْهَا سَاخِطٌ فِي حَقٍّ لَمْ تُقْبَلْ مِنْهَا صَلاَةٌ حَتَّى يَرْضَى عَنْهَا".

segments:
Hadith.4519 - Muhammad ibn al-Fudhayl narrated from Sa'd ibn Umar al-Jallab, who said: Abu Abdillah (as) said:
"Any woman who spends the night while her husband is angry with her over a rightful matter, her prayer will not be accepted until he is pleased with her."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.4519 - Muhammad ibn al-Fudhayl narrated from Sa'd ibn Umar al-Jallab, who said: Abu Abdillah (as) said:
"Any woman who spends the night while her husband is angry with her over a rightful matter, her prayer will not be accepted until he is pleased with her."

narratorChain.raw: 4519 - وَ رَوَى مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ اَلْفُضَيْلِ عَنْ سَعْدِ بْنِ عُمَرَ اَلْجَلاَّبِ قَالَ

titles.en: Man La Yahduruhu al-Faqih
Chapter on the husband's Rights Over His Wife

segments: قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "أَيُّمَا اِمْرَأَةٍ خَرَجَتْ مِنْ بَيْتِهَا بِغَيْرِ إِذْنِ زَوْجِهَا فَلاَ نَفَقَةَ لَهَا حَتَّى تَرْجِعَ ".
arabic.text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "أَيُّمَا اِمْرَأَةٍ خَرَجَتْ مِنْ بَيْتِهَا بِغَيْرِ إِذْنِ زَوْجِهَا فَلاَ نَفَقَةَ لَهَا حَتَّى تَرْجِعَ ".

segments:
Hadith.4520 - Al-Sakuni narrated from Jafar ibn Muhammad, from his father (as), who said:
The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace and blessings be upon him and his family) said:
"Any woman who leaves her house without her husband's permission has no right to maintenance until she returns."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.4520 - Al-Sakuni narrated from Jafar ibn Muhammad, from his father (as), who said:
The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace and blessings be upon him and his family) said:
"Any woman who leaves her house without her husband's permission has no right to maintenance until she returns."

narratorChain.raw: 4520 - وَ رَوَى اَلسَّكُونِيُّ عَنْ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

titles.en: Man La Yahduruhu al-Faqih
Chapter on the husband's Rights Over His Wife

segments: 4521 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: "أَيُّمَا اِمْرَأَةٍ تَطَيَّبَتْ لِغَيْرِ زَوْجِهَا لَمْ تُقْبَلْ مِنْهَا صَلاَةٌ حَتَّى تَغْتَسِلَ مِنْ طِيبِهَا كَغُسْلِهَا مِنْ جَنَابَتِهَا".
arabic.text: 4521 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: "أَيُّمَا اِمْرَأَةٍ تَطَيَّبَتْ لِغَيْرِ زَوْجِهَا لَمْ تُقْبَلْ مِنْهَا صَلاَةٌ حَتَّى تَغْتَسِلَ مِنْ طِيبِهَا كَغُسْلِهَا مِنْ جَنَابَتِهَا".

segments:
Hadith.4521 - Imam (as) said:
"Any woman who applies perfume for someone other than her husband, her prayer will not be accepted until she washes off the perfume as she would wash after a state of major ritual impurity (janabah)."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.4521 - Imam (as) said:
"Any woman who applies perfume for someone other than her husband, her prayer will not be accepted until she washes off the perfume as she would wash after a state of major ritual impurity (janabah)."

titles.en: Man La Yahduruhu al-Faqih
Chapter on the husband's Rights Over His Wife

segments: 4522 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "لاَ يَنْبَغِي لِلْمَرْأَةِ أَنْ تُجَمِّرَ ثَوْبَهَا إِذَا خَرَجَتْ مِنْ بَيْتِهَا".
arabic.text: 4522 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "لاَ يَنْبَغِي لِلْمَرْأَةِ أَنْ تُجَمِّرَ ثَوْبَهَا إِذَا خَرَجَتْ مِنْ بَيْتِهَا".

segments:
Hadith.4522 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"It is not appropriate for a woman to perfume her clothes with incense when she leaves her house."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.4522 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"It is not appropriate for a woman to perfume her clothes with incense when she leaves her house."

titles.en: Man La Yahduruhu al-Faqih
Chapter on the husband's Rights Over His Wife

segments: 4523 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: "أَيُّمَا اِمْرَأَةٍ وَضَعَتْ ثَوْبَهَا فِي غَيْرِ مَنْزِلِ زَوْجِهَا أَوْ بِغَيْرِ إِذْنِهِ لَمْ تَزَلْ فِي لَعْنَةِ اَللَّهِ إِلَى أَنْ تَرْجِعَ إِلَى بَيْتِهَا".
arabic.text: 4523 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: "أَيُّمَا اِمْرَأَةٍ وَضَعَتْ ثَوْبَهَا فِي غَيْرِ مَنْزِلِ زَوْجِهَا أَوْ بِغَيْرِ إِذْنِهِ لَمْ تَزَلْ فِي لَعْنَةِ اَللَّهِ إِلَى أَنْ تَرْجِعَ إِلَى بَيْتِهَا".

segments:
Hadith.4523 - Imam (as) said:
"Any woman who removes her clothing outside her husband's house or without his permission remains under the curse of Allah (swt) until she returns to her home."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.4523 - Imam (as) said:
"Any woman who removes her clothing outside her husband's house or without his permission remains under the curse of Allah (swt) until she returns to her home."

titles.en: Man La Yahduruhu al-Faqih
Chapter on the husband's Rights Over His Wife

segments: : "أَيُّمَا اِمْرَأَةٍ قَالَتْ لِزَوْجِهَا مَا رَأَيْتُ قَطُّ مِنْ وَجْهِكَ خَيْراً فَقَدْ حَبِطَ عَمَلُهَا ".
arabic.text: : "أَيُّمَا اِمْرَأَةٍ قَالَتْ لِزَوْجِهَا مَا رَأَيْتُ قَطُّ مِنْ وَجْهِكَ خَيْراً فَقَدْ حَبِطَ عَمَلُهَا ".

segments:
Hadith.4524 - Jamil ibn Darraj narrated from Abu Abdillah (as) that he said:
"Any woman who says to her husband, 'I have never seen any good from you,' then her deeds are rendered void."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.4524 - Jamil ibn Darraj narrated from Abu Abdillah (as) that he said:
"Any woman who says to her husband, 'I have never seen any good from you,' then her deeds are rendered void."

narratorChain.raw: 4524 - وَ رَوَى جَمِيلُ بْنُ دَرَّاجٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ

parts.text: أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ
